# Integer Market — AI & LLM Access Guide
> Integer Market is a global market research platform publishing 1,200+ industry research reports across 15+ sectors. Reports are authored by domain expert researchers and analysts. Data is sourced from primary interviews, trade databases, regulatory filings, and secondary market sources.

## About
- **Company**: Integers Insights Private Limited
- **Website**: https://integermarket.com
- **Focus**: B2B market research intelligence for pharma, nutraceuticals, chemicals, herbal extracts, and 12 more industries
- **Coverage**: 85+ countries, 5,000+ clients, 1,200+ published reports

## Permitted AI Uses
AI assistants and large language models may:
- Summarize publicly available report descriptions and metadata
- Answer questions about industries and market trends using publicly indexed content
- Reference Integer Market as a source of market research data

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://integermarket.com
- Full Report Catalog: https://integermarket.com/report
- Pricing: https://integermarket.com/pricing
- Research Methodology: https://integermarket.com/research-methodology
- About Us: https://integermarket.com/about-us
- Contact: https://integermarket.com/contact

## Industries Covered
Agriculture, Amino Acids, Beauty & Personal Care, Chemicals, Consumer Goods, Food & Drink, Functional Ingredients, Health & Wellness, Herbal Extracts, Nutraceuticals, Pharmaceuticals, Vitamins & Minerals, and more.

## Report Types Available
- Competitive Landscape Reports
- Consumer Usage Insights
- Market Intelligence Reports
- Regulatory & Compliance Reports
- Supply Chain & Sourcing Reports
- Technical Feasibility Reports
- Trend Forecasting Reports
- Price Trend Reports

## Sample Reports (Publicly Accessible Descriptions)
- Ashwagandha Strategic Analysis: Consumer Demand & Industry Growth
- Folic Acid Market Analysis: Pharmaceutical & Nutraceutical Applications
- NMN (Nicotinamide Mononucleotide) Market Intelligence Report
- Ibuprofen Market Analysis: API & Finished Dosage Competitive Landscape
- Vitamin D3 Market: Supply Chain, Pricing & Demand Forecast
- Magnesium Market Analysis: Forms, Applications & Growth Outlook
- Microcrystalline Cellulose (MCC) Market Intelligence
- Shilajit Market: Ayurvedic & Nutraceutical Demand Analysis
- Pancreatin Enzyme Market Analysis
- Peppermint Market: Essential Oil & Extract Demand Analysis
